details.test: Task 1: Add newest affordable sci-fi book to Main Reading List (adapted)
Task 2: Favorite longer of two sci-fi novels under 20 using compare (adapted)
Task 3: Review highly rated short work under 120 pages with 4-star rating
Task 4: Register for earliest online event in March 2025 with note
Task 5: Create sci-fi ebook bundle (up to 3 books) under 10 each and add to cart (adapted)
Task 6: Send contact message about bulk order of 25 paperbacks
Task 7: Add cheapest highly rated YA books 2018-2020 to Summer 2025 wishlist (adapted)
Task 8: Save most recent Writing Process post with comments to reading list (adapted)
